calendar.matters:
Petition For Instruction Re: Confirming Trustee Of Trust And Request To Ratify Actions Of Maura Albrecht As Attorney-In-Fact
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Azita Rahim appeared via zoom for Maura Albrecht (petitioner).
Richard O'Hara appeared via zoom for Mark Chism (objector).

Judge Russell S. Roeca disclosed that he represented the law firm JKZ in the past.

Discussion was held regarding proper venue, that with the on-going litigation in San Mateo County the real property was sold in 2024 in San Mateo County, that the objector waived venue, and that with pending matters in San Mateo County the venue should be proper there.

The Court orders the case be transferred to San Mateo County Superior Court.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
